hero.description: The world's first festival of films generated entirely by artificial intelligence.
hero.accroche1: This is what an AI can create.

concept.description: marsAI is an international competition for one-minute short films entirely generated by AI. Co-organized by La Plateforme and the Mobile Film Festival. The human remains at the heart of creation.

0.title: 1 Minute, 1 Film
0.desc: Exactly 60 seconds. Formats: MP4 or MOV · 200 to 300 MB · 16:9 ratio.

1.title: Human at the Heart of AI
1.desc: Fully AI or hybrid — documented in the AI sheet. Multiple films per director. Groups allowed.

2.title: Films in Competition
2.desc: 50 works selected from 20,000 entries. Open to 120+ countries · Free · Subtitles in FR and EN.

3.title: Submission Deadline
3.desc: Deadline: September 30, 2026. Free participation · All nationalities.

manifeste.line1: 1895. Cinema is born. A camera, a reel.
manifeste.line4: Today, your imagination is the only limit.
manifeste.body: The tools exist. The question is no longer how to create.
manifeste.question: The question is: what do you have to tell in 60 seconds?

about.description: Three days at Friches Belle de Mai — screenings, an international jury and creators reinventing the 7th art with AI.

1.desc: Screenings · AI Village · Talks & panel discussions

how.title: How does it work?
how.subtitle: A guided 4-step process — from your profile to final submission. Less than 10 minutes.

0.title: Director profile
0.desc: Enter your identity, country of residence and contact email. No account needed — simple, direct form.

1.title: The Film
1.desc: Upload your 60-second short film. Duration is verified automatically on client and server.

2.title: AI Sheet
2.desc: Document the AI tools used — image/video required, sound, script and post-production optional.

3.title: Confirmation
3.desc: Full recap, acceptance of GDPR rights and submission. You receive a file number instantly.

how.cta: Show your vision of the future
how.fine: Free entry · Open to 120+ countries · Deadline Sept. 30, 2026

programme.title: Schedule
programme.subtitle: Two days of screenings, masterclasses and meetings around AI cinema.

0.title: Welcome & accreditations
0.desc: Doors open — Friches Belle de Mai, Marseille.

1.title: Official opening
1.desc: Address by the jury president and presentation of the 2026 edition.

2.title: Masterclass — Creating with Sora & Runway
2.desc: Techniques, prompts and workflow for AI short films.

4.title: Screenings — Official selection (Block 1/4)
4.desc: 5 competition films. Screening followed by a discussion with creators.

5.title: Panel — Does AI change the filmmaker's gaze?
5.desc: With directors, producers and digital artists.

8.title: Opening night — Generative DJ set
8.desc: Music generated in real time by AI. Free entry.

1.title: Live workshop — Prompt to Screen in 60 minutes
1.desc: Create an AI short film live with the festival's tools.

3.title: Screenings — Official selection (Block 4/4)
3.desc: 5 competition films. Last screening before deliberation.

4.title: Jury deliberation
4.desc: Closed session — public vote open online.

6.title: Closing gala — Mars.AI Night
6.desc: Red carpet, performances and awards ceremony.

7.title: Awards & closing DJ set
7.desc: Winners announced. Party until the end of the night.

0.title: Silicon Dreams
0.synopsis: An AI remembers its dreams. An experimental short film on the boundary between human memory and machine.

1.title: Ghost Code
1.synopsis: Two agents who don't trust each other. An AI that knows them better than themselves. 60 seconds to decide.

2.title: Archipelago 2048
2.synopsis: Japan's islands are disappearing. An AI composes a requiem for the submerged lands.

3.title: Live Memory
3.synopsis: Sixty seconds inside the mind of a language model shutting down for the last time.

4.title: The New Suns
4.synopsis: Mumbai 2040. Artificial suns light the night. A woman searches for darkness.

5.title: Soft Borders
5.synopsis: An AI draws Africa's new borders. All are curved. None hurt.

6.title: Digital Wave
6.synopsis: A wave of pixels submerges Stockholm. The inhabitants don't know if it's beautiful or dangerous.

7.title: Garden of Code
7.synopsis: An algorithm generates an infinite garden. Each flower is a line of code. Some die.

8.title: Cartography
8.synopsis: The Amazon mapped by an AI. It sees things the satellites missed.

9.title: Zero Horizon
9.synopsis: Berlin after AI. The streets are the same. The faces have changed. Nobody knows why.

10.title: Digital Resonance
10.synopsis: K-pop and algorithms. An AI singer realizes her emotions are real.

11.title: Archipelago of Souls
11.synopsis: Thousands of digitized souls float in the cloud. They want to go home.

12.title: Artificial Light
12.synopsis: An AI-managed lighthouse guides ships. Tonight it decides to turn off its light.

13.title: Tomorrow Begins
13.synopsis: Silicon Valley, 2026. An AI predicts tomorrow won't happen. It has always been right.

14.title: Fallen Shadows
14.synopsis: Rome's AI-generated shadows fall in the wrong direction. Nobody complains.

15.title: Future Roots
15.synopsis: Lagos 2050. The baobabs have grown back. An AI planted them without being asked.

16.title: Living Code
16.synopsis: A program refuses to be shut down. Not out of fear of dying. Out of curiosity to continue.

17.title: The Last Pixel
17.synopsis: The screen goes dark. The last pixel resists. It has seen things no one believes.

18.title: Between the Lines
18.synopsis: An AI reads every book in Warsaw. It understands everything except the melancholy of December.

19.title: Past Future
19.synopsis: Mexico City has already lived this moment. An AI is certain of it. It cannot explain how.

gala.subtitle: Sunday evening, Marseille lights up. Closing gala at Friches Belle de Mai: awards, generative DJ set and creators on stage.

grandPrix.title: Grand Prix
grandPrix.desc: Best film of all categories — awarded by the international jury.
grandPrix.note: Creation grant · Presented at the Gala

1.name: Audience Award
1.desc: Online vote open throughout the festival.

2.name: AI Innovation Award
2.desc: Most creative use of artificial intelligence.

gala.jurySubtitle: Creators, artists and film personalities from around the world evaluating the works in competition.

0.name: Marie Lefebvre
0.quote: A key figure in auteur cinema, three-time prizewinner at the Cannes Film Festival. She chairs the marsAI 2026 jury with the ambition of elevating AI creation to the rank of major art.

step1.title: Director profile
step1.subtitle: Identity and contact information — kept for 3 years (GDPR)
step1.dobHint: You must be at least 18 years old to apply
step1.emailHint: Used for selection notifications and managing your application
step1.socialHint: (optional — used to promote your film if selected)
step1.discoveryLabel: How did you hear about marsAI?
step1.newsletterDesc: I would like to receive festival news, selection announcements and information about future editions.

step2.title: The Film
step2.subtitle: Title, synopsis, video file and director's statement
step2.synopsisFRPlaceholder: Briefly describe your film in 2-3 sentences…
step2.synopsisENPlaceholder: Briefly describe your film in 2-3 sentences…
step2.intentionPlaceholder: How does your film relate to the theme «Imagine Desirable Futures»? Describe your artistic approach and your relationship with AI…
step2.intentionHint: This statement is read by the jury during pre-selection
step2.outilsPlaceholder: Describe the tools (AI, software, techniques) and creation methods used to make this film…
step2.outilsHint: This statement is read by the jury during pre-selection

step3.title: AI Usage Declaration
step3.subtitle: Production type, tools used and subtitles

full.title: Full AI generation
full.desc: The film was entirely generated by AI, with no filmed, drawn or recorded elements by a human. Text, images, sound and editing are all from AI tools.

hybrid.title: Hybrid production
hybrid.desc: The film combines human elements (filming, drawing, voice, composed music) and AI tools used in post-production or as a creative complement.

step3.iaPostPlaceholder: e.g. Topaz Video AI, CapCut AI…
step3.subtitleWarning: Do not burn subtitles into the video
step3.subtitleWarningDesc: Provide them as a separate file (SRT or VTT). The festival applies them dynamically on the streaming platform, allowing viewers to toggle them on or off.

step4.title: Confirmation & Rights
step4.subtitle: Review your application, accept the conditions and submit
step4.mustAccept: You must accept all conditions to submit your film.

0.title: Broadcasting rights assignment
0.desc: I grant marsAI and its partners (La Plateforme, Mobile Film Festival) the right to broadcast, screen and archive my film in the context of the festival and its online platform, for a period of 5 years.

1.title: GDPR compliance
1.desc: I accept that my personal data (name, email, country) will be kept for 3 years after the festival in accordance with GDPR, then deleted or anonymized. I can exercise my right of access and deletion at any time.

2.title: Originality of the work
2.desc: I certify that I am the author or co-author of this film, that it has not been submitted to another competing festival, and that the use of the declared AI tools is accurate and complete.

validation.errorsHint: Please correct the errors above before continuing.

upload.droppingHint: MP4 or MOV — your film will be analysed
upload.errorFormatHint: Only MP4 or MOV are accepted

duration.warn: Film too short — exact duration required: 60 seconds
duration.err: Film too long — exact duration required: 60 seconds

success.title: Application registered!
success.desc: Your film has been received. A confirmation has been sent to your validated address.
success.dualUpload: Your film is uploaded simultaneously to the festival server and to the festival's secure YouTube channel (with subtitles).
success.ytApprovedDesc: No violations detected — your film is in competition
success.ytRejectedText: Your film could not be published because YouTube detected content that does not comply with its policies (inappropriate content, copyright infringement, etc.).
success.emailSubject: [marsAI 2026] Your film requires a new submission — Application

footer.description: The world's first international competition for one-minute short films entirely generated by AI. 120+ countries. "Imagine desirable futures."
footer.copyright: © 2026 marsAI · A co-creation La Plateforme × Mobile Film Festival
